docs.title: Roni Herschmann - Forward Deployed Software Engineer
docs.text:
SF Bay Area

Contact: roniherschmann@gmail.com · roni.herschmann@columbia.edu

Currently, I work as an FDSE at QualiTau Inc., embedded between engineering departments to create innovative software applications that solve hard problems with precision.

Forever curious and happy to learn about new things — don't hesitate to reach out.

docs.title: Education
docs.text:
• B.A. Computer Science; B.A. Business — Columbia University in the City of New York (2021–Dec. 2025)
  • M.S. Artificial Intelligence, Robotics & Perception — Columbia University in the City of New York (Incoming Aug. 2026–May 2027)

docs.title: Previous work
docs.text: I have experience across Investment Banking, BioTech, FinTech, and Semiconductor Reliability Testing.

docs.title: Internships during undergrad
docs.text:
• Solutions Engineering Intern — QualiTau Inc.
  • Investment Banking (covered Deep-tech, software, and all things related to Israel) — Jefferies
  • Labs, Technical Marketing, general software development — QualiTau Inc.
  • Product Engineering — Scopio Labs

docs.title: Engineering
docs.text:
I have made real contributions to projects in the following fields:

  • ML Applications
  • LLM Fine-tuning / Reinforcement Learning
  • Network Engineering
  • Compliance Automation
  • Full Stack Development
  • SDLC
  • Mobile App Development (iOS / Xcode)
  • Business Development & Market Research
  • Financial Modeling & Finance Automation

My GitHub repos are private, but if you're interested in learning more about my software projects, feel free to reach out.

I'm fluent in English and Hebrew, and I've been playing the drums for over 17 years.
